zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Dorothy Harpur於大約1500年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格亞特 格利姆斯比 聖 瑪麗 安德 聖 詹姆斯時，她的父親Robert Harpur16歲，母親Elyn Lyttleton17歲。她於大約1520年與Anthony Kingston在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1532年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾可寧頓享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: Harpur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: variant spelling of Harper , common in Ireland. The origins are both Norman ( le Harpur) and Gaelic ( Mac Chruiteir) ‘son of the harper’, from Gaelic cruit ‘harp’.

variants.name: Harper
meanings: English (Staffordshire), Scottish, Irish (Antrim and Down), and Dutch: occupational name for a player on the harp, from Middle English harper(e) ‘harper’ (Old English hearpere) and Middle Dutch harper, herper. The harper was one of the most important figures of a medieval baronial hall, especially in Scotland and northern England, and the office of harper was sometimes hereditary. The Scottish surname is probably an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Chruiteir ‘son of the harper’ (from Gaelic cruit ‘harp’, ‘stringed instrument’). This surname has long been present in Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Dorothy Harpur was born about 1500, in Great Grimsby St Mary and St James, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Harpur, was 16 and her mother, Elyn Lyttleton, was 17. She married Anthony Kingston about 1520, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1532, in Quenington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

Elle a épousé Anthony Kingston environ 1520, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. ko.Great Grimsby, North East Lincolnshire d: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 그리트 그림스비 스트 메리 앤드 스트 자메스
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Dorothy Harpur(이)가 대략 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 그리트 그림스비 스트 메리 앤드 스트 자메스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Harpur(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elyn Lyttleton(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Anthony Kingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 크닝턴에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Great Grimsby, North East Lincolnshire d: грит гримсби ст мэри анд ст джемесь, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Dorothy Harpur родилась около 1500 г. в местности грит гримсби ст мэри анд ст джемесь, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Harpur было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Elyn Lyttleton, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anthony Kingston около 1520 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1532 г. в местности куенингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.
